queries.question: In what area are the clinics located?
queries.sql: Select neighborhood from hospitals where name like '%Clinic%';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?neighborhood WHERE {
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:neighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?name_lk), "^.*Clinic.*$"))
}

queries.question: What hospital does Dr. Jane Doe work at and what neighborhood is it in?
queries.sql: Select Hospitals.name, Hospitals.neighborhood from Hospitals join Doctors on Doctors.hospital_id = Hospitals.id where Doctors.name = 'Dr. Jane Doe';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?neighborhood WHERE {
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?doctors p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name .
  ?hospitals p:neighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?doctors p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Dr. Jane Doe"))
}
